$comment: Curated food-group catalog for the serving log (issue #579): ~24 groups at the habit tier (one serving = one tap), each with a stable slug (food_log.group_key), a serving description, a tier (encourage/limit/neutral), and the #577 nutrient-food-map keys it's a source of. Committed + HUMAN-REVIEWABLE. Regenerate with `npm run gen:food-groups`. INFORMATIONAL dietary guidance, NOT medical advice.

groups.name: Fatty fish
groups.serving: A palm-sized fillet (~4 oz) of salmon, sardines, mackerel, herring

groups.name: White / lean fish
groups.serving: A palm-sized fillet (~4 oz) of cod, tilapia, haddock

groups.name: Shellfish
groups.serving: ~3 oz of shrimp, clams, mussels, oysters

groups.name: Leafy greens
groups.serving: A cup of raw (or ½ cup cooked) spinach, kale, chard, romaine

groups.name: Cruciferous vegetables
groups.serving: ½ cup of broccoli, cauliflower, Brussels sprouts, cabbage

groups.name: Other vegetables
groups.serving: ½ cup of peppers, carrots, tomatoes, squash

groups.name: Legumes & beans
groups.serving: ½ cup of cooked lentils, chickpeas, black beans, tofu

groups.name: Nuts & seeds
groups.serving: A small handful (~1 oz) of almonds, walnuts, pumpkin seeds, chia

groups.name: Whole grains
groups.serving: ½ cup of cooked oats, brown rice, quinoa, whole-grain bread

groups.name: Fruit
groups.serving: One piece or ~½ cup of whole fruit

groups.name: Berries
groups.serving: ½ cup of blueberries, strawberries, raspberries

groups.name: Fermented foods
groups.serving: A serving of yogurt, kefir, sauerkraut, kimchi, miso

groups.name: Poultry
groups.serving: A palm-sized portion (~4 oz) of chicken or turkey

groups.name: Eggs
groups.serving: One to two eggs

groups.name: Dairy
groups.serving: A cup of milk, a slice of cheese, ¾ cup of yogurt

groups.name: Red meat
groups.serving: A palm-sized portion (~4 oz) of beef, pork, lamb

groups.name: Potatoes & starchy veg
groups.serving: One medium potato or ½ cup of sweet potato, corn, peas

groups.name: Water
groups.serving: A glass (~8 oz) of water or unsweetened drink

groups.name: Processed meat
groups.serving: A serving of bacon, sausage, deli meat, hot dogs

groups.name: Refined grains
groups.serving: A serving of white bread, white rice, pasta, crackers

groups.name: Fried / fast food
groups.serving: A serving of fried or fast food

groups.name: Sugary foods & desserts
groups.serving: A dessert, candy, or sweetened snack

groups.name: Sugar-sweetened drinks
groups.serving: A soda, juice drink, or sweetened coffee/tea

groups.name: Alcohol
groups.serving: One standard drink (12 oz beer, 5 oz wine, 1.5 oz spirits)
